## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.
descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione del lavoro Il team di Talent Acquisition (TA) fa parte della funzione HR e si occupa di attrarre e assumere i migliori talenti per EFG Bank. Stiamo cercando uno stagista motivato in Talent Acquisition per unirsi al nostro team per uno stage di 6 mesi a Lugano o Ginevra. In questo ruolo, avrai un ruolo chiave nel migliorare l'esperienza dei candidati, supportare le attività quotidiane di Talent Acquisition e contribuire alla preparazione di report e all'ottimizzazione dei processi. Avrai anche l'opportunità di supportare e, gradualmente, gestire alcune posizioni di reclutamento junior sotto la guida di un Talent Acquisition Specialist.

## Responsabilità principali Esperienza del candidato & Supporto TA
- Agire come punto di contatto per i candidati, garantendo comunicazioni chiare, tempestive e professionali durante tutto il processo di reclutamento.
- Coordinare e pianificare le interviste con i responsabili del reclutamento e altri stakeholder.
- Supportare gli Specialisti di Talent Acquisition nella selezione dei CV e nella valutazione dei candidati in base ai requisiti del ruolo.
- Redigere e pubblicare annunci di lavoro su piattaforme interne ed esterne, garantendo la coerenza con il brand aziendale di EFG. Supporto operativo e amministrativo
- Eseguire le operazioni quotidiane nel sistema di Applicant Tracking System (ATS), inclusa l'inserimento dei dati, i controlli di qualità dei dati e gli aggiornamenti dello stato.
- Mantieni record accurati dei candidati e garantisci una documentazione appropriata di ogni passo del processo di reclutamento.
- Preparare corrispondenza standard e comunicazioni con i candidati e i responsabili del reclutamento.
- Supportare la coordinazione delle valutazioni (test, studi di caso, controlli di riferimento), se applicabile. Reporting & Miglioramento dei processi
- Supportare la preparazione di report di reclutamento regolari e semplici dashboard (es. stato della pipeline, tempo di assunzione, fonti di assunzione).
- Aiutare a monitorare le metriche chiave di TA e identificare tendenze o colli di bottiglia di base nel processo.
- Contribuire con idee per ottimizzare e standardizzare i processi di reclutamento, i modelli e i flussi di comunicazione.
- Partecipare a piccoli progetti mirati a migliorare gli strumenti, l'esperienza del candidato e l'efficienza interna di TA. Sourcing & Supporto Employer Branding
- Assistire nel sourcing dei candidati tramite LinkedIn Recruiter, job board, referrals e altri canali.
- Condurre iniziali pre-screening telefonici o video per ruoli selezionati, sotto supervisione.
- Supportare le iniziative di employer branding (es. preparazione di contenuti per i social media o il sito di carriera, o fiere del lavoro). Esposizione al reclutamento junior
- Supportare gradualmente e, dove appropriato, gestire il reclutamento end-to-end per posizioni junior o di stage, sotto la guida di uno Specialista di Talent Acquisition.

## Competenze e esperienza Istruzione & Esperienza
- Laurea magistrale (o attualmente iscritto a un programma di laurea magistrale) in Risorse Umane, Amministrazione Aziendale, Psicologia o un campo correlato.
- Esperienza precedente (stage, ruolo part-time o simile) nel recruiting, HR o employer branding è un plus.
- Esperienza in gestione dei dati, reporting o lavoro con sistemi HR/ATS è un vantaggio. Competenze linguistiche
- Ottimo comando dell'inglese (parlato e scritto).
- Buono comando dell'italiano o francese è considerato un forte plus, a seconda della sede. Competenze tecniche e analitiche
- Interesse a lavorare con strumenti e piattaforme HR (es. Applicant Tracking Systems, LinkedIn Recruiter, siti di carriera).
- Buone competenze in MS Office, specialmente in Excel e PowerPoint, con interesse per il reporting e le basi dell'analisi.
- Alta attenzione ai dettagli e accuratezza nel gestire i dati e i compiti amministrativi. Competenze personali
- Forte interesse per Talent Acquisition, il settore bancario e la gestione degli investimenti.
- Eccellenti competenze di comunicazione e interpersonali, con un naturale focus sul servizio e l'esperienza del candidato.
- Organizzato, strutturato e in grado di gestire più compiti e priorità.
- Proattivo, curioso e disposto a prendere responsabilità dei compiti e suggerire miglioramenti.
- Orientato al team, collaborativo e a proprio agio in un ambiente internazionale e multicultural.
- Allineamento con la cultura imprenditoriale di EFG: hands-on, orientato alle soluzioni e aperto al learning.

## I nostri valori
- Responsabilità: Prendersi la responsabilità per i compiti e le sfide, cercando miglioramenti continui
- Hands-on: Essere proattivi per consegnare rapidamente risultati di alta qualità
- Passionate: Essere impegnati e strenuamente per eccellenza
- Orientati alla soluzione: Focus sui risultati per i clienti e trattamento equo dei clienti con una mentalità consapevole del rischio
- Orientati alla partnership: Promuovere collaborazione e teamwork. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.

## Si prega di allegare una lettera di presentazione al CV quando si invia la candidatura.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Stellenbeschreibung Das Talent Acquisition (TA) Team ist Teil der Human Resources und verantwortlich für die Attraktion und Einstellung der besten Talente für EFG Bank. Wir suchen einen motivierten Talent Acquisition Intern, der für ein 6-monatiges Praktikum in Lugano oder Genf zu unserem Team stoßen soll. In dieser Rolle werden Sie einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Verbesserung der Kandidatenerfahrung, Unterstützung bei den täglichen Aktivitäten von Talent Acquisition und zur Erstellung von Berichten und Prozessoptimierung leisten. Sie werden auch die Möglichkeit haben, die Unterstützung und, woappropriate, die Verwaltung einiger Junior-Rekrutierungsaufträge unter der Anleitung eines Talent Acquisition Specialists zu übernehmen.

## Hauptaufgaben Kandidatenerfahrung & TA-Unterstützung
- Als Ansprechpartner für Kandidaten agieren und sicherstellen, dass die Kommunikation während des gesamten Rekrutierungsprozesses klar, zeitnah und professionell erfolgt.
- Koordination und Terminplanung von Interviews mit Einstellungsleitern und anderen Stakeholdern.
- Unterstützung der Talent Acquisition Specialists bei der Bewerbungsprüfung und der Bewertung von Kandidaten anhand der Stellenanforderungen.
- Erstellung und Veröffentlichung von Stellenausschreibungen auf internen und externen Plattformen, wobei die Konsistenz mit dem Employer Brand von EFG gewährleistet wird. Betrieblicher & Administrativer Support
- Ausführung der täglichen Operationen im Applicant Tracking System (ATS), einschließlich Dateneingabe, Datenqualitätsprüfungen und Statusaktualisierungen.
- Erhalt und Pflege akkurater Kandidatendaten und Dokumentation jedes Schrittes im Rekrutierungsprozess.
- Vorbereitung standardisierter Korrespondenz und Kommunikation mit Kandidaten und Einstellungsleitern.
- Unterstützung bei der Koordination von Assessments (Tests, Fallstudien, Referenzprüfungen), wo zutreffend. Reporting & Prozessverbesserung
- Unterstützung bei der Erstellung regelmäßiger Rekrutierungsberichte und einfacher Dashboards (z.B. Pipeline-Status, Zeit bis zur Einstellung, Quellen der Einstellung).
- Hilfe bei der Überwachung der wichtigsten TA-Metriken und Identifizierung grundlegender Trends oder Engpässe im Prozess.
- Mit Ideen zur Optimierung und Standardisierung von Rekrutierungsprozessen, Vorlagen und Kommunikationsflüssen beitragen.
- An kleinen Projekten zur Verbesserung von Tools, Kandidatenerfahrung und interner TA-Effizienz teilnehmen. Sourcing & Employer Branding-Unterstützung
- Unterstützung bei der Kandidatensuche über LinkedIn Recruiter, Jobportale, Empfehlungen und andere Kanäle.
- Durchführung von ersten Telefon- oder Video-Vorauswahlgesprächen für ausgewählte Stellen unter Aufsicht.
- Unterstützung von Employer Branding-Initiativen (z.B. Vorbereitung von Inhalten für Social Media oder die Karrierewebsite oder Jobmessen). Exposition an Junior-Rekrutierung
- Unterstützung und, wo angemessen, Verwaltung der End-to-End-Rekrutierung für ausgewählte Junior- oder Praktikumsstellen unter der Anleitung eines Talent Acquisition Specialists.

## Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung Bildung & Erfahrung
- Masterabschluss (oder aktuell eingeschrieben in ein Masterstudium) in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychologie oder einem verwandten Fach.
- Vorherige Erfahrung (Praktikum, Teilzeitstelle oder ähnliches) in der Rekrutierung, HR oder Employer Branding ist ein Pluspunkt.
- Erfahrung in der Datenverwaltung, Berichterstattung oder Arbeit mit HR/ATS-Systemen ist ein Vorteil. Sprachkenntnisse
- Exzellente Englischkenntnisse (gesprochen und geschrieben).
- Gute Kenntnisse in Italienisch oder Französisch sind je nach Standort ein starker Pluspunkt. Technische & Analytische Fähigkeiten
- Interesse an der Arbeit mit HR-Tools und -Plattformen (z.B. Applicant Tracking Systems, LinkedIn Recruiter, Karrierewebsites).
- Gute MS Office-Kenntnisse, insbesondere in Excel und PowerPoint, mit Interesse an Berichterstattung und Grundlagen der Analyse.
- Hohe Aufmerksamkeit für Details und Genauigkeit bei der Handhabung von Daten und administrativen Aufgaben. Persönliche Kompetenzen
- Starkes Interesse an Talent Acquisition, der Bankenbranche und der Investmentverwaltung.
- Exzellente Kommunikations- und Interpersonalfähigkeiten, mit natürlichem Fokus auf Service und Kandidatenerfahrung.
- Organisiert, strukturiert und in der Lage, mehrere Aufgaben und Prioritäten zu verwalten.
- Proaktiv, neugierig und bereit, Verantwortung für Aufgaben zu übernehmen und Verbesserungsvorschläge zu machen.
- Teamorientiert, kooperativ und gewohnt, in einem internationalen und multikulturellen Umfeld zu arbeiten.
- Ausrichtung an die unternehmerische Kultur von EFG: hands-on, lösungsorientiert und offen für Lernen.

## Unsere Werte
- Verantwortung: Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen übernehmen und kontinuierliche Verbesserung suchen
- Hands-on: Proaktiv sein, um schnell hochwertige Ergebnisse zu liefern
- Leidenschaftlich: Engagiert sein und nach Exzellenz streben
- Lösungsorientiert: Fokus auf die Ergebnisse für Kunden und faire Behandlung von Kunden mit einem risikobewussten Denken
- Partnerschaftlich: Zusammenarbeit und Teamwork fördern. Zusammenarbeiten mit einem unternehmerischen Geist.

## Bitte fügen Sie bei der Bewerbung einen Anschreiben zu Ihrem Lebenslauf an.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description du poste L'équipe d'Acquisition de Talents (TA) fait partie de la fonction RH et est responsable de l'attraction et de l'embauche des meilleurs talents pour EFG Bank. Nous recherchons un stagiaire motivé en Acquisition de Talents pour rejoindre notre équipe pour un stage de 6 mois à Lugano ou Genève. Dans ce rôle, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans l'amélioration de l'expérience des candidats, le soutien aux activités quotidiennes de l'Acquisition de Talents et la contribution à la rédaction de rapports et à l'optimisation des processus. Vous aurez également l'opportunité de soutenir et, progressivement, de gérer certaines missions de recrutement junior sous la supervision d'un Spécialiste en Acquisition de Talents.

## Responsabilités principales Expérience des candidats & Soutien TA
- Agir comme point de contact pour les candidats, en assurant une communication claire, ponctuelle et professionnelle tout au long du processus de recrutement.
- Coordonner et planifier les entretiens avec les responsables du recrutement et autres parties prenantes.
- Soutenir les Spécialistes en Acquisition de Talents dans le dépistage des CV et l'évaluation des candidats par rapport aux exigences du poste.
- Rédiger et publier les offres d'emploi sur les plateformes internes et externes, en veillant à la cohérence avec la marque employeur d'EFG. Soutien opérationnel et administratif
- Exécuter les opérations quotidiennes dans le système de suivi des candidats (ATS), y compris la saisie de données, les vérifications de qualité des données et les mises à jour de statut.
- Maintenir des dossiers de candidats précis et assurer une documentation appropriée de chaque étape du processus de recrutement.
- Préparer des correspondances standard et des communications avec les candidats et les responsables du recrutement.
- Soutenir la coordination des évaluations (tests, études de cas, vérifications de références), le cas échéant. Reporting & Amélioration des processus
- Soutenir la préparation de rapports de recrutement réguliers et de tableaux de bord simples (par exemple, statut du pipeline, temps d'embauche, sources d'embauche).
- Aider à surveiller les indicateurs clés de TA et à identifier des tendances ou des goulots d'étranglement de base dans le processus.
- Contribuer avec des idées pour optimiser et standardiser les processus de recrutement, les modèles et les flux de communication.
- Participer à de petits projets visant à améliorer les outils, l'expérience des candidats et l'efficacité interne de TA. Sourcing & Soutien Employer Branding
- Aider à la recherche de candidats via LinkedIn Recruiter, les plateformes d'emploi, les recommandations et autres canaux.
- Effectuer des premiers présélections téléphoniques ou vidéo pour les postes sélectionnés, sous supervision.
- Soutenir les initiatives de branding employeur (par exemple, préparation de contenus pour les réseaux sociaux ou le site de carrière, ou les salons de l'emploi). Exposition au recrutement junior
- Soutenir progressivement et, le cas échéant, gérer le recrutement end-to-end pour des postes junior ou de stage, sous la supervision d'un Spécialiste en Acquisition de Talents.

## Compétences et expérience Éducation & Expérience
- Diplôme de master (ou actuellement inscrit dans un programme de master) en Ressources Humaines, Administration des Affaires, Psychologie ou un domaine connexe.
- Expérience antérieure (stage, emploi à temps partiel ou similaire) en recrutement, RH ou branding employeur est un plus.
- Expérience en gestion de données, reporting ou travail avec des systèmes HR/ATS est un avantage. Compétences linguistiques
- Excellent niveau d'anglais (oral et écrit).
- Bon niveau de français ou d'italien est considéré comme un fort atout, selon le lieu de travail. Compétences techniques et analytiques
- Intérêt pour le travail avec les outils et plateformes RH (par exemple, systèmes de suivi des candidats, LinkedIn Recruiter, sites de carrière).
- Bonnes compétences en MS Office, notamment en Excel et PowerPoint, avec un intérêt pour le reporting et les bases de l'analyse.
- Forte attention aux détails et précision dans la gestion des données et des tâches administratives. Compétences personnelles
- Forte intérêt pour l'Acquisition de Talents, le secteur bancaire et la gestion des investissements.
- Excellentes compétences en communication et en relations interpersonnelles, avec un naturel focus sur le service et l'expérience des candidats.
- Organisé, structuré et capable de gérer plusieurs tâches et priorités.
- Proactif, curieux et prêt à prendre en charge les tâches et à suggérer des améliorations.
- Orienté vers l'équipe, collaboratif et à l'aise dans un environnement international et multiculturel.
- Alignement avec la culture entrepreneuriale d'EFG : hands-on, orienté vers les solutions et ouvert à l'apprentissage.

## Nos valeurs
- Responsabilité : Prendre en charge les tâches et les défis, en cherchant une amélioration continue
- Hands-on : Être proactif pour livrer rapidement des résultats de haute qualité
- Passionné : Être engagé et travailler pour l'excellence
- Orienté vers la solution : Se concentrer sur les résultats pour les clients et traiter les clients de manière équitable avec une mentalité consciente des risques
- Orienté vers la partenariat : Promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial.

## Veuillez joindre une lettre de motivation à votre CV lors de l'envoi de votre candidature.

summary: The Talent Acquisition (TA) team is part of the Human Resources function and is responsible for attracting and hiring the best talent in the market for EFG Bank.

We are looking for a motivated Talent Acquisition Intern to join our team for a 6‑month internship in Lugano or Geneva. In this role, you will play a key part in enhancing the candidate experience, supporting Talent Acquisition in day‑to‑day activities, and contributing to reporting and process optimisation. You will also have the opportunity to support, and progressively manage, some junior recruitment mandates under guidance.
Key Responsibilities
responsibilities: Act as a point of contact for candidates, ensuring clear, timely and professional communication throughout the recruitment process.
Coordinate and schedule interviews with hiring managers and other stakeholders.
Support Talent Acquisition Specialists in screening CVs and assessing candidates against role requirements.
Draft and post job advertisements on internal and external platforms, ensuring consistency with EFG’s employer brand.
Execute daily operations in the Applicant Tracking System (ATS), including data entry, data quality checks and status updates.
Maintain accurate candidate records and ensure proper documentation of each recruitment step.
Prepare standard correspondence and communication to candidates and hiring managers.
Support coordination of assessments (tests, case studies, reference checks), where applicable.
Support the preparation of regular recruitment reports and simple dashboards (e.g. pipeline status, time‑to‑hire, sources of hire).
Help monitor key TA metrics and identify basic trends or bottlenecks in the process.
Contribute ideas to streamline and standardise recruitment processes, templates and communication flows.
Participate in small projects aimed at improving tools, candidate experience and internal TA efficiency.
Assist in sourcing candidates via LinkedIn Recruiter, job boards, referrals and other channels.
Conduct initial phone or video pre‑screenings for selected roles, under supervision.
Support employer branding initiatives (e.g. content preparation for social media or the career site, or job fairs).
Progressively support and, where appropriate, manage end‑to‑end recruitment for selected junior or intern positions, under the guidance of a Talent Acquisition Specialist.

sections.heading: Our Company
paragraphs: EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

sections.heading: Our Purpose and Mission
paragraphs: Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

jobs.title: Temp Contract - IT Business Analyst/Developer
jobs.description:
## Specification of Core Function

Our team delivers solutions and provides support for internal and third-party systems in place for the Investment Client Solution (ICS) business. Support, business analysis, testing and development is provided for all business lines of the ICS including Advisory, Discretionary and New Capital Funds. The main aspect of this role is Support and Business Analyst functions. The role involves interaction with a wide range of end users from all aspects of the business (e.g. Front office, Middle office, Back office, Risk and Compliance as well as IT). The role involves providing support for Production critical issues, understanding and challenging business change requirements, testing changes, co-ordinating delivery workstreams, devising workable efficient scalable solutions to meet business requirements.

## Tasks and Responsibilities

-  Provide day-to-day support of the various application systems.

-  Document new system enhancements, implement and test enhancements, provide training to users

-  Liaise with existing users and technical analysts and the relevant application vendors

-  Configuration, roll-out, training and application support of Charles River / Aladdin and surrounding applications

-  Define and test required solutions to enhance the existing features and functionalities of the IT solutions

-  Obtain expertise in using and configuring the Charles River / Aladdin applications

-  Progress in timely manner with defining changes and the delivery of required changes in the systems

-  Escalate issues in timely manner with all required stakeholders

-  Progress work according to agreed priorities (and ensure that priorities are understood if there are any ambiguities)

-  Conduct and document and agree gap analysis of any required changes with Vendor and business users

-  Prepare, agree and document detailed process flows, test plan, test execution reports and other project documentation

## Requirements and Qualifications

-  Bachelor or Master degree qualification in a numerate subject (e.g. Engineering, Economics, maths, etc…)

-  Strong communication skills (written and oral)

-  Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills /ability to think quick on your feet)

-  Strong attention to detail

-  Ability to be independent and take ownership of tasks

-  Goal-oriented

-  Excellent knowledge of MS Office

-  Software experience: Microsoft SQL, Excel Macros, Visual Basic

-  Knowledge of Charles River and / or BlackRock Aladdin (preferable)

-  English (French/German/Italian would be beneficial)

-  Effective interpersonal skill in negotiation and influencing

-  Must be able to travel from time to time if required

-  Previous experience in financial industry would be preferable

-  Expectation to be office based

Our Values

- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence

- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

## Application

Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

-  Knowledge of Charles River and / or BlackRock Aladdin (preferable)

-  English (French/German/Italian would be beneficial)

-  Effective interpersonal skill in negotiation and influencing

-  Must be able to travel from time to time if required

-  Previous experience in financial industry would be preferable

-  Expectation to be office based

Our Values

- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence

- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

## Application

Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.
descriptionByLocale.it:
Specifica della funzione principale Il nostro team fornisce soluzioni e fornisce supporto per i sistemi interni e di terze parti in atto per l'attività Investment Client Solution (ICS). Vengono forniti supporto, analisi aziendale, test e sviluppo per tutte le linee di business dell'ICS, compresi i fondi di consulenza, discrezionali e di nuovo capitale. L'aspetto principale di questo ruolo sono le funzioni di supporto e analista aziendale. Il ruolo prevede l'interazione con un'ampia gamma di utenti finali provenienti da tutti gli aspetti dell'azienda (ad esempio front office, middle office, back office, rischio e conformità, nonché IT). Il ruolo prevede di fornire supporto per problemi critici di produzione, comprendere e sfidare i requisiti di cambiamento aziendale, testare le modifiche, coordinare i flussi di lavoro di consegna, ideare soluzioni scalabili ed efficienti per soddisfare i requisiti aziendali.

## Compiti e responsabilità
- Fornire supporto quotidiano dei vari sistemi applicativi.
- Documentare i nuovi miglioramenti del sistema, implementare e testare miglioramenti, fornire formazione agli utenti
- Collaborare con gli utenti esistenti, gli analisti tecnici e i relativi fornitori di applicazioni
- Configurazione, implementazione, formazione e supporto applicativo di Charles River / Aladdin e delle applicazioni circostanti
- Definire e testare le soluzioni necessarie per migliorare le caratteristiche e le funzionalità esistenti delle soluzioni IT
- Acquisire competenze nell'utilizzo e nella configurazione delle applicazioni Charles River / Aladdin
- Progredire in modo tempestivo con la definizione delle modifiche e la fornitura delle modifiche richieste nei sistemi
- Inoltrare i problemi in tempestivamente con tutte le parti interessate richieste
- Progredire il lavoro in base alle priorità concordate (e garantire che le priorità siano comprese in caso di ambiguità)
- Condurre e documentare e concordare la gap analysis di eventuali modifiche richieste con il fornitore e gli utenti aziendali
- Preparare, concordare e documentare flussi di processo dettagliati, piano di test, rapporti di esecuzione dei test e altra documentazione di progetto

## Requisiti e qualifiche
- Qualifica di laurea triennale o magistrale in una materia numerata (ad esempio ingegneria, economia, matematica, ecc...)
- Forti capacità di comunicazione (scritta e orale)
- Eccellenti capacità analitiche e capacità di problem-solving/capacità di pensare velocemente)
- Forte attenzione ai dettagli
- Capacità di essere indipendente e assumersi la responsabilità dei compiti
- Orientamento agli obiettivi
- Ottima conoscenza di MS Office
- Esperienza con software: Microsoft SQL, macro di Excel, Visual Basic
- Conoscenza di Charles River e/o BlackRock Aladdin (preferibile)
- Inglese (francese/tedesco/italiano sarebbe utile)
- Efficaci capacità interpersonali nella negoziazione e nell'influenza
- Deve essere in grado di viaggiare di tanto in tanto se necessario
- Precedenti esperienze nel settore finanziario sarebbero utili preferibile
- Aspettativa di lavorare in ufficio I nostri valori
- Responsabilità: assumersi la responsabilità di compiti e sfide, nonché ricercare il miglioramento continuo
- Pratico: essere proattivi per fornire rapidamente risultati di alta qualità
- Appassionato: impegnarsi e puntare all'eccellenza
- Orientato alla soluzione: concentrarsi sui risultati dei clienti e trattare i clienti in modo equo con una mentalità consapevole del rischio
- Orientato alla partnership: promuovere la collaborazione e il lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con spirito imprenditoriale.

## Assicurati di allegare una lettera di presentazione al tuo CV quando compili la domanda.

## Candidatura Se desideri candidarti per questa posizione, utilizza questo collegamento per candidarti.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Spezifikation der Kernfunktion Unser Team liefert Lösungen und bietet Support für interne und Drittsysteme, die für das Investment Client Solution (ICS)-Geschäft vorhanden sind. Unterstützung, Geschäftsanalyse, Tests und Entwicklung werden für alle Geschäftsbereiche des ICS bereitgestellt, einschließlich Beratungs-, Vermögensverwaltungs- und neue Kapitalfonds. Der Hauptaspekt dieser Rolle sind Support- und Business-Analyst-Funktionen. Die Rolle umfasst die Interaktion mit einem breiten Spektrum von Endbenutzern aus allen Bereichen des Unternehmens (z. B. Front Office, Middle Office, Back Office, Risiko und Compliance sowie IT). Die Rolle umfasst die Bereitstellung von Unterstützung bei produktionskritischen Problemen, das Verstehen und Herausfordern von Geschäftsänderungsanforderungen, das Testen von Änderungen, die Koordinierung von Bereitstellungsarbeitsabläufen und die Entwicklung praktikabler, effizienter, skalierbarer Lösungen zur Erfüllung der Geschäftsanforderungen.

## Aufgaben und Verantwortlichkeiten – Bereitstellung der täglichen Unterstützung der verschiedenen Anwendungssysteme.
- Dokumentieren Sie neue Systemerweiterungen, implementieren und testen Sie Verbesserungen, bieten Sie Schulungen für Benutzer an.
- Arbeiten Sie mit bestehenden Benutzern und technischen Analysten sowie den relevanten Anwendungsanbietern zusammen.
- Konfiguration, Einführung, Schulung und Anwendungsunterstützung von Charles River/Aladdin und umgebenden Anwendungen Rechtzeitig mit allen erforderlichen Stakeholdern
- Arbeit gemäß den vereinbarten Prioritäten vorantreiben (und sicherstellen, dass die Prioritäten verstanden werden, wenn Unklarheiten bestehen)
- Lückenanalyse aller erforderlichen Änderungen mit Anbietern und Geschäftsanwendern durchführen, dokumentieren und vereinbaren
- Detaillierte Prozessabläufe, Testpläne, Testdurchführungsberichte und andere Projektdokumentationen vorbereiten, vereinbaren und dokumentieren

## Anforderungen und Qualifikationen
- Bachelor- oder Masterabschluss in einem numerischen Fach (z. B. Ingenieurwesen, Wirtschaft, Mathematik usw.)
- Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten (schriftlich und mündlich)
- Ausgezeichnete analytische Fähigkeiten und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten/Fähigkeit, schnell zu denken)
- Starke Liebe zum Detail
- Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu sein und Verantwortung für Aufgaben zu übernehmen
- Zielorientiert
- Hervorragende Kenntnisse von MS Office
- Softwareerfahrung: Microsoft SQL, Excel-Makros, Visual Basic
- Kenntnisse von Charles River und/oder BlackRock Aladdin (vorzugsweise)
- Englisch (Französisch/Deutsch/Italienisch wäre von Vorteil)
- Effektive zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten in Verhandlungen und Einflussnahme
- Muss bei Bedarf von Zeit zu Zeit reisen können
- Vorkenntnisse in der Finanzbranche wären wünschenswert wünschenswert – Erwartung, im Büro zu arbeiten. Unsere Werte – Verantwortlichkeit: Übernahme von Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie Streben nach kontinuierlicher Verbesserung – Praxisnah: Proaktiv sein, um schnell qualitativ hochwertige Ergebnisse zu liefern – Leidenschaftlich: Engagement und Streben nach Exzellenz – Lösungsorientiert: Fokussierung auf Kundenergebnisse und fairer Umgang mit Kunden mit einer risikobewussten Denkweise – Partnerschaftsorientiert: Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit. Mit Unternehmergeist zusammenarbeiten.

## Bitte fügen Sie Ihrem Lebenslauf unbedingt ein Anschreiben bei, wenn Sie die Bewerbung ausfüllen.

## Bewerbung Wenn Sie sich für diese Stelle bewerben möchten, verwenden Sie diesen Link, um sich zu bewerben.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Spécification de la fonction principale Notre équipe fournit des solutions et fournit un support pour les systèmes internes et tiers en place pour l'activité Investment Client Solution (ICS). Le support, l'analyse commerciale, les tests et le développement sont fournis pour tous les secteurs d'activité de l'ICS, y compris les fonds de conseil, discrétionnaires et de nouveaux capitaux. L'aspect principal de ce rôle concerne les fonctions de Support et de Business Analyst. Le rôle implique une interaction avec un large éventail d'utilisateurs finaux issus de tous les aspects de l'entreprise (par exemple, Front office, Middle office, Back office, Risques et conformité ainsi que informatique). Le rôle consiste à fournir une assistance pour les problèmes critiques de production, à comprendre et à répondre aux exigences de changement commercial, à tester les changements, à coordonner les flux de travail de livraison et à concevoir des solutions évolutives efficaces et réalisables pour répondre aux exigences commerciales.

## Tâches et responsabilités
- Assurer le support quotidien des différents systèmes d'application.
- Documenter les nouvelles améliorations du système, mettre en œuvre et tester les améliorations, fournir une formation aux utilisateurs
- Assurer la liaison avec les utilisateurs existants et les analystes techniques et les fournisseurs d'applications concernés
- Configuration, déploiement, formation et support des applications de Charles River / Aladdin et des applications environnantes
- Définir et tester les solutions requises pour améliorer les caractéristiques et fonctionnalités existantes des solutions informatiques
- Obtenir une expertise dans l'utilisation et la configuration des applications Charles River / Aladdin
- Progresser en temps opportun dans la définition des changements et la livraison des changements requis dans les systèmes
- Escalader les problèmes en temps opportun avec toutes les parties prenantes requises
- Faire progresser le travail selon les priorités convenues (et s'assurer que les priorités sont comprises en cas d'ambiguïtés)
- Mener, documenter et convenir d'une analyse des écarts de tout changement requis avec le fournisseur et les utilisateurs professionnels
- Préparer, convenir et documenter les flux de processus détaillés, le plan de test, les rapports d'exécution des tests et autres documents du projet

## Exigences et qualifications
- Diplôme de licence ou de maîtrise dans une matière de calcul (par exemple, ingénierie, économie, mathématiques, etc.)
- Solides compétences en communication (écrite et orale)
- Excellentes compétences analytiques et de résolution de problèmes / capacité à réfléchir rapidement
- Forte attention aux détails
- Capacité à être indépendant et à s'approprier les tâches
- Orienté vers les objectifs
- Excellente connaissance de MS Office
- Expérience logicielle : Microsoft SQL, Excel Macros, Visual Basic
- Connaissance de Charles River et/ou BlackRock Aladdin (préférable)
- Anglais (français/allemand/italien serait bénéfique)
- Compétences interpersonnelles efficaces en matière de négociation et d'influence
- Doit être capable de voyager de temps en temps si nécessaire
- Une expérience antérieure dans le secteur financier serait préférable
- Attente d'être basé au bureau. Valeurs
- Responsabilité : s'approprier les tâches et les défis, ainsi que rechercher une amélioration continue
- Pratique : être proactif pour fournir rapidement des résultats de haute qualité
- Passionné : être engagé et rechercher l'excellence
- Orienté vers les solutions : se concentrer sur les résultats des clients et traiter les clients équitablement avec un état d'esprit conscient des risques
- Orienté vers le partenariat : promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit d'entreprise.

## Veuillez vous assurer de joindre une lettre de motivation à votre CV lorsque vous remplissez votre candidature.

## Candidature Si vous souhaitez postuler pour ce poste, utilisez ce lien pour postuler.

jobs.title: Senior Investment Counsellor
jobs.description:
## 1. Investment Advisory

- Follow developments in the financial markets to maintain an understanding of both present and future trends and how they might affect investment strategies

- Provide comprehensive investment advice and solutions to top-tier private bankers and their clients on global products including fixed income instruments, equities, funds, hedge funds, derivatives and structured products

- Respond to all private bankers requests on trades, investment strategies, and supply them with the relevant supporting documents

- Act efficiently in operational processing of investment actions and client instructions

- Conduct and communicate detailed market research and investment solutions

- Ensure proactive, individualized, and professional delivery of advisory services by working collaboratively with various internal teams and entities within the group

- Collaborate with internal teams to develop the local Advisory services in line with clients needs

- Act as the liaison for Advisory services in local committees and delivers related presentations

- Continuously enhance the efficiency and quality of Advisory services through appropriate measures

## 2. Business Development

- Anticipate clients' needs and uncover related opportunities to maximize business potential

- Assist Private Bankers in acquiring new business and identifying investment solutions that match prospect/client’s needs

- Advocate the Promotion of the Investment Solutions (presentation, Investment proposal, book review…)

- Support the growth in Advisory and Discretionary mandates by implementing suitable sales strategies

## 3. Risk and control

- Ensure compliance with all regulatory requirements and banks policies and procedures

- Daily controls of portfolios

Skills and experience

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Economics and/or Finance. CFA level would be a plus.

- Minimum of 10 years experience in a similar function within a Wealth Management or Asset management Environment.

- High level of technicity and ability to communicate ideas and recommendations

- Very good commercial and communication skills

- Fluent in Greek and English, French would be a plus

Our Values

Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence

Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

jobs.title: Head of Structured Solutions - Asia
jobs.description:
## Main responsibilities

- Leading the Structured Products Distribution & Offering in Asia

- Partner with the Client Relationship Officers and Investment Counsellors to increase Structured Products revenues and penetration

- Drive innovation in structured solutions offering

- Interact with local Investment Banks and monitor market & product trends

- Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements in all structured solutions activities

- Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders (Global Markets, Product Due Diligence, Risk & Compliance, Operations…)

- Foster a culture of continuous learning and development within the Client Facing Employee community

- Support the IT projects to build a scalable structured solutions platform

- Identify and mitigate risks associated with structured products projects

Skills and Experience

- Approximately 10 years of experience in structured solutions sales management

- Strong technical expertise in flow and complex structured solutions

- Proven track record of successful distribution strategy development and implementation.

- Fluent in English, proficiency in an additional Asian language is a plus

- Strong leadership and communication skills.

- Entrepreneur attitude and independent contributor to a dynamic regional & functional environment

- Result oriented with strong attention to details.

## Our Values

- Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

- Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

- Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

- Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

- Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

sections.heading: Our Company
paragraphs: EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

sections.heading: Our Purpose and Mission
paragraphs: Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

sections.heading: Role
paragraphs: The Head of Structured Solutions Asia leads the Distribution of Structured Products in Asia. The position involves promoting, developing and implementing structured solutions distribution strategies for the Asian market, leading the product offering and achieve commercial objectives, collaborating with various departments to ensure effective implementation, driving innovation, ensuring compliance, monitoring product and market trends, fostering continuous learning and development, building and maintaining relationships with client facing employees and stakeholders, and identifying/mitigating risks.

jobs.title: Private Markets Product Specialist
jobs.description:
## General Info

- Department: Private Markets

- Work time Percentage: 100%

- Location: Singapore

## Job Description

We are searching for a Senior Private Markets Product Specialist to help drive innovation across the region, as part of our global network.

This is your chance to join an entrepreneurial team, make your mark, and help build the future of private markets in Asia. Be a key player in a newly created position, with real opportunities for personal and professional growth.

We are searching for a candidate who shares our enthusiasm for delivering a first-class client experience through an engaging and proactive relationship approach. This is an excellent opportunity to join a growing, seasoned and entrepreneurial team with strong personal and professional development opportunities.

## Main responsibilities

- Accountable for driving a strategic and hands-on distribution effort across our private markets solutions, focusing on EFG’s in-house private markets program and product suite of perpetual/evergreen funds

- Partner with Client Relationship Officers (CROs), Investment Counsellors (ICs) and their clients to increase overall allocations to the asset class

- Responsible for impactful and tailor-made marketing content for in-person and written presentations, both internally and for our global client base

- Foster the ongoing development of our private markets franchise by identifying client demands and trends to shape our future product offering

- Design educational initiatives to drive asset class-specific learning excellence and impact across various stakeholder groups within EFG

## Skills and experience

- 5+ years working experience in distribution and/or sales within the private markets industry, preferably focused on global private wealth clients

- For senior-level role: 10+ years of relevant working experience required

- Ambitious and self-motivation personality with the ability to work in a target driven high-performance culture while maintaining “down-to-earth” attitude

- Entrepreneurial mindset with an enthusiastic, flexible and hands-on approach

- Excellent communication, presentation and interpersonal skills, with proficiency in English and Mandarin (Cantonese beneficial)

- Master’s degree in Finance or similar and further professional qualifications (CFA, CAIA, etc.)

- Advanced proficiency in PowerPoint and Excel, with the ability to create impactful client-facing marketing material

## Our Values

- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence

- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

## Application

Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

jobs.title: Business Risk Manager - PB COO
jobs.description:
## Key Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain a comprehensive risk and control assessment for all aspects of risk within the FLoD, including effective oversight of the testing programme.

- Execute   a risk-based control monitoring programme   across the function, evidencing the adequacy and effectiveness of key controls.

- Perform regular business controls and monitoring on areas such as Investment Suitability, Cross Border, Anti-Fraud, etc., including management reporting and proactive recommendations.

- Conduct thematic reviews, investigations and gap analyses across FLoD activities.

- Participate in and/or lead projects and change initiatives to implement process and control enhancements.

- Promote a strong risk awareness and client fairness culture across the business.

- Collaborate closely with Second Line of Defense, Global Functions and other internal stakeholders to identify, assess and mitigate risks and ensure appropriate controls are in place.

- Proactively escalate and report issues, provide advice and challenge existing processes related to business activities.

- Manage the FLoD Risk Scorecard, ensuring proper tracking, execution and data integrity.

- Provide professional advice to front office staff on investment advisory activities to ensure compliance with internal policies, procedures and local regulatory requirements.

- Build strong relationships and credibility with key internal stakeholders.

- Provide guidance to junior team members and new joiners,  and act as a checker to ensure quality and accuracy of reviews.

- Undertake any other duties within Business Risk Management as directed by the Head of Business Risk Management

## Role Requirement

-  5+ years and solid business risk management experience in private banking / wealth management.

-  Strong analytical skills, sound judgement and a high level of integrity and rule compliance.

-  Ability to work independently, challenge the status quo and build strong stakeholder relationships

- Participate in and/or lead projects and change initiatives to implement process and control enhancements.

- Promote a strong risk awareness and client fairness culture across the business.

- Collaborate closely with Second Line of Defense, Global Functions and other internal stakeholders to identify, assess and mitigate risks and ensure appropriate controls are in place.

- Proactively escalate and report issues, provide advice and challenge existing processes related to business activities.

- Manage the FLoD Risk Scorecard, ensuring proper tracking, execution and data integrity.

- Provide professional advice to front office staff on investment advisory activities to ensure compliance with internal policies, procedures and local regulatory requirements.

- Build strong relationships and credibility with key internal stakeholders.

- Provide guidance to junior team members and new joiners,  and act as a checker to ensure quality and accuracy of reviews.

- Undertake any other duties within Business Risk Management as directed by the Head of Business Risk Management

## Role Requirement

-  5+ years and solid business risk management experience in private banking / wealth management.

-  Strong analytical skills, sound judgement and a high level of integrity and rule compliance.

-  Ability to work independently, challenge the status quo and build strong stakeholder relationships

jobs.title: DataOps Engineer
jobs.description:
General Info

- Department: Data Ops Engineer

- Work time Percentage: 100%

- Location: Singapore

Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

Job Description

## Introduction to the Team

- DataOps Team is responsible for seemless integration, release and monitoring of mission critical data pipelines and workflows

- Currently based in Geneva, we are expanding our global footprint by establishing a virtual team presence in Singapore.

- Reporting to the local IT Head of Applications, the role will be a key pillar in our follow-the-sun support model, ensuring continuous operational excellence across Asia and Europe timezone.

- Our data platform is evolving into a more converged stack, unifying data streams and batches. We are expanding into a cloud based lakehouse and a microservice based data streaming integration model supporting business critical integrations

- To support team activity Python, SQL and CI/CD are essentialskills. This role requires a rigorous approach to documentation and procedure development.

- The team is responsible for building, testing, deploying and monitor the operating part of the platform.

Tasks and Responsibilities

- Take operational ownership of specific data services (change management, quality assurance, SLA, SOP)

- Track and ensure operations continuity of critical data pipelines across the group during Asian hours, adopting a follow-the sun support model.

- Design, implement, and optimize data pipeline in batch and streaming mode.

- Follow and apply CI/CD practice to automate and streamline deployments and integrations.

- Create, maintain, improve documentation and operational procedures as part of operational ownership

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to review governance and improve integration operations.

- Maintain high standards of data quality, reliability, and performance.

- Stay current with advancements in data engineering, of dataops tech stack, to support continuous improvement.

Requirements and Qualifications

- Experience in data engineering and data operations roles.

- Proven hands-on experience with SQL, Python, PySpark and Databricks

- Knowledge of micro-services architecture, API management and observability is highly desirable.

- Solid understanding of CI/CD platforms and processes (e.g., Azure DevOps, GitLabCI, GitHub Actions).

- Experience with cloud data platforms (Azure preferred).

- Demonstrated ability to produce rigorous, clear, and comprehensive documentation and procedures.

- Familiarity with database design.

- Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

- Effective communication and collaboration skills.

Personal Attributes

- Responsible and reliable, especially during critical operational periods

- Rigorous and methodical in documentation and process creation

- Motivated and goal-oriented

- Curious, enthusiastic, creative, and proactive

- Passionate about analytics and technology, with a strong desire to learn and grow

- Fluent in spoken and written English

Our Values

Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

Application

Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

jobs.title: Information Security & BCM Head (Asia)
jobs.description:
General Info
- Department: Global CISO
- Work time Percentage: 100%
- Location: Singapore ideally or Hong-Kong

Our Company
EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

Our Purpose and Mission
Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

Job Description
EFG’s Information Security and BCM team, led by the Group CISO, sets and coordinates global information security strategy, initiatives, and standards across EFG International. The team conducts security risk assessments, manages vulnerability and threat programs, and owns security awareness and training. It safeguards EFG’s infrastructure, applications, and data against breaches, malware, third‑party risks, and cyber-attacks. Additionally, it strengthens the bank’s defence through robust Business Continuity Management, supporting operational resilience and coordinated incident response

The Information Security & BCM Head Asia reports to the Regional COO with a functional line to the Group CISO, and will (i) identify regional risks, threats, and vulnerabilities across the SG and HK branches; (ii) address gaps against local laws, regulations, and industry practices; (iii) develop and tailor information security controls to the region’s risks, adapt policies and procedures to local culture and laws, and facilitate Group strategic initiatives; and (iv) ensure adherence to global Business Continuity Management policies while adopting BCM best practices per local regulatory requirements.

Main responsibilities

Strategy, governance, and leadership

-
Support and implement EFG’s information security strategy and programs, ensuring alignment with local business objectives.

-
Provide regional leadership on information security across SG and HK; serve as the Singapore and Hong Kong Information Security Officer.

-
Manage information security programs directed by Head Office and act as the primary contact for regulatory inquiries, reviews, and inspections.

-
Stay current on regulatory changes and industry trends; perform gap analyses on regulatory papers, circulars, and directives, and recommend improvements.

Risk management, compliance, and audit

-
Identify, evaluate, and manage regional information security risks and vulnerabilities; ensure preventative actions close risk gaps.

-
Conduct regular security assessments and audits to ensure compliance with internal, regulatory, and industry requirements; ensure timely closure of audit items.

-
Develop and maintain local security policies, procedures, and standards aligned with Head Office and regulators.

-
Collaborate on Operational Resilience and Business Continuity (BCP); act as local BCM referant ensuring internal and external requirements (e.g., HKMA OR-2) are met.

Incident management and monitoring

-
Lead and coordinate incident response locally and regionally in close collaboration with the Head Office CISRT, including investigation, root cause analysis, and treatment plans.

-
Review data security breaches, implement remediation, and design and lead the annual cyber-security incident drill for SG & HK.

-
Collaborate with Group Information Security to deploy monitoring tools safeguarding bank information.

Access governance and secure operations

-
Oversee timely completion of local and regional user access recertifications.

-
Approve and periodically review privileged access for business and IT users; recertify IT administrator and technical account access on locally and regionally managed infrastructure.

-
Serve as gatekeeper for data extraction from secure zones.

Stakeholder engagement, communications, and training

-
Build and maintain relationships with stakeholders, clients, leadership, regulators, and Head Office teams.

-
Monitor and manage security communications from Head Office and regulators.

-
Lead security awareness and training programs for employees and relevant stakeholders.

Technology, assessments, and continuous improvement

-
Support assessments for infrastructure and applications; perform periodic security reviews and audits.

-
Recommend enhancements to controls and processes based on emerging threats and best practices.

Reporting, budgeting, and resource management

-
Report timely status of projects, programs, risks, events, and incidents to the Group CISO.

-
Prepare spending proposals; manage local security budgets and resources effectively.

Skills and experience
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
- 10+ years in information security with strong knowledge of security principles, practices, and technologies.
- Proven experience designing and implementing enterprise security programs.
- Hands-on incident management and incident response expertise.
- Demonstrated leadership, including managing and influencing virtual/remote teams.
- Excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills.
- Successful track record working with regulators and regulatory bodies.
- Experience in ICT Risk Management and Business Continuity.
- Industry certifications (e.g., CISSP, CISM, CRISC) preferred.

Our Values
 Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement
 Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results
 Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence
 Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset
 Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.
Application
Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

Collaborate on Operational Resilience and Business Continuity (BCP); act as local BCM referant ensuring internal and external requirements (e.g., HKMA OR-2) are met.

Incident management and monitoring

-
Lead and coordinate incident response locally and regionally in close collaboration with the Head Office CISRT, including investigation, root cause analysis, and treatment plans.

-
Review data security breaches, implement remediation, and design and lead the annual cyber-security incident drill for SG & HK.

-
Collaborate with Group Information Security to deploy monitoring tools safeguarding bank information.

Access governance and secure operations

-
Oversee timely completion of local and regional user access recertifications.

-
Approve and periodically review privileged access for business and IT users; recertify IT administrator and technical account access on locally and regionally managed infrastructure.

-
Serve as gatekeeper for data extraction from secure zones.

Stakeholder engagement, communications, and training

-
Build and maintain relationships with stakeholders, clients, leadership, regulators, and Head Office teams.

-
Monitor and manage security communications from Head Office and regulators.

-
Lead security awareness and training programs for employees and relevant stakeholders.

Technology, assessments, and continuous improvement

-
Support assessments for infrastructure and applications; perform periodic security reviews and audits.

-
Recommend enhancements to controls and processes based on emerging threats and best practices.

Reporting, budgeting, and resource management

-
Report timely status of projects, programs, risks, events, and incidents to the Group CISO.

-
Prepare spending proposals; manage local security budgets and resources effectively.

Skills and experience
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
- 10+ years in information security with strong knowledge of security principles, practices, and technologies.
- Proven experience designing and implementing enterprise security programs.
- Hands-on incident management and incident response expertise.
- Demonstrated leadership, including managing and influencing virtual/remote teams.
- Excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills.
- Successful track record working with regulators and regulatory bodies.
- Experience in ICT Risk Management and Business Continuity.
- Industry certifications (e.g., CISSP, CISM, CRISC) preferred.

Our Values
 Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement
 Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results
 Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence
 Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset
 Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

jobs.title: Foundation Manager
jobs.description:
## Job Summary

The Pension Fund Manager is in charge of managing and administering the company pension fund, ensuring compliance with current regulations and protection of the interests of the employees of affiliated companies against the economic consequences of old age, death, and disability. He/she coordinates all operational, financial, and administrative activities of the pension fund, in line with the foundation regulations, policies and legal provisions.

## Tasks and Responsibilities

- Overall responsibility for the administrative management, technical-accounting and business activities of Fondazione

- Define the financial and actuarial regulations and parameters underlying the plan in order to achieve long-term financial equilibrium

- Administrative and operational management of the pension fund, including enrolment of members, management of contributions and benefits.

- Supervises the establishment of the Annual Report, the accounting and actuarial reporting to the foundation board and the supervisory bodies as well as the reporting according to IAS 19 to EFG SA

- Coordination with external bodies (actuarial consultants, auditors, supervisory authorities) and service providers (custodian banks, asset managers).

- Supervision of pension fund investments, in accordance with the investment regulations and risk criteria.

- Supervision and control of annual accounts, financial statements and documentation required by supervisory bodies.

- Supporting the Board of Foundation in defining the pension fund's strategy, ensuring the financial stability of the foundation

- Managing communications to members, including information on benefits and regulatory changes.

- Monitoring regulatory developments in the field of pensions and updating internal procedures.

- Supervises the internal control system

- Ensure constant collaboration with the human resources department of EFG SA, agreeing procedures, identifying synergies and jointly analysing common topics

- Prepare and coordinate the meetings of the foundation board and investment committee, drawing up the relevant minutes

- Actively provide pension advice to all insured persons (active employees and pensioners.

## Requirements and Qualifications

- Degree in Economics, Finance, Actuarial Science or related disciplines.

- Proven experience in the management of pension funds, provident funds or similar institutions.

- Sound knowledge of pension legislation (e.g. LOB in Switzerland or equivalent local legislation).

- Expertise in financial management and investment supervision.

- Excellent organisational, analytical and interpersonal skills.

- Advanced knowledge of IT tools for pension management and reporting.

- Managerial competences.

- Languages: Italian, English – German and French are assets

## Working Relationships

The Administration of the Foundation is composed of a small team, where collaboration between the Pension Fund Manager and all other roles of the Team is essential.

The role implies frequent interactions with Board members, external auditors, actuaries, human resources office, reinsurer, investment advisory, responsible of investment mandates, relationship manager of the Custodian Bank.

## Decision-Making & Autonomy

Autonomous and structured management of all tasks, with a global overview of the entire operations of the Foundation.

Plans and organizes activities quickly, recognizing priorities, formulating solutions appropriate to the circumstances. Communicates his views to colleagues in a timely manner, seeking to promote transparency, circulation of information within the team and process efficiency.

## Working Conditions

Work in EFG Office Lugano with frequent travel to EFG offices or to service providers (Actuary, Investment Controller, cooperating financial institutions, …) in Geneva or Zurich.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Sintesi del Lavoro Il Responsabile del Fondo Pensionistico è incaricato della gestione e dell'amministrazione del fondo pensionistico dell'azienda, garantendo il rispetto delle normative vigenti e la protezione degli interessi dei dipendenti delle società affiliate contro le conseguenze economiche dell'età avanzata, della morte e dell'invalidità. Coordina tutte le attività operative, finanziarie e amministrative del fondo pensionistico, in linea con i regolamenti della fondazione, le politiche e le disposizioni legali.

## Compiti e Responsabilità
- Responsabilità complessiva della gestione amministrativa, tecnico-contabile e operativa della Fondazione
- Definizione delle regolamentazioni e dei parametri attuariali sottostanti il piano al fine di raggiungere un equilibrio finanziario a lungo termine
- Gestione amministrativa e operativa del fondo pensionistico, inclusa l'iscrizione dei membri, la gestione delle contribuzioni e dei benefici
- Supervisione della redazione del Rapporto Annuale, della contabilità e della relazione attuariale alla board della fondazione e agli organismi di controllo, nonché del reporting secondo IAS 19 a EFG SA
- Coordinamento con enti esterni (consulenti attuariali, revisori, autorità di controllo) e fornitori di servizi (banche custodi, gestori di asset)
- Supervisione degli investimenti del fondo pensionistico, in conformità con le regolamentazioni di investimento e i criteri di rischio
- Supervisione e controllo dei conti annuali, delle dichiarazioni finanziarie e della documentazione richiesta dagli organismi di controllo
- Supporto alla Board della Fondazione nella definizione della strategia del fondo pensionistico, garantendo la stabilità finanziaria della fondazione
- Gestione delle comunicazioni ai membri, inclusa l'informazione sui benefici e le modifiche normative
- Monitoraggio dello sviluppo normativo nel campo delle pensioni e aggiornamento delle procedure interne
- Supervisione del sistema di controllo interno
- Garanzia di una costante collaborazione con il dipartimento risorse umane di EFG SA, concordando procedure, identificando sinergie e analizzando insieme temi comuni
- Preparazione e coordinamento delle riunioni della board della fondazione e del comitato di investimento, redigendo le relative minute
- Fornire attivamente consulenza pensionistica a tutti i beneficiari (dipendenti attivi e pensionati)

## Requisiti e Qualifiche
- Laurea in Economia, Finanza, Scienze Attuariali o discipline correlate
- Esperienza comprovata nella gestione di fondi pensionistici, fondi di previdenza o istituzioni simili
- Conoscenza solida della legislazione pensionistica (es. LOB in Svizzera o legislazione locale equivalente)
- Competenza nella gestione finanziaria e supervisione degli investimenti
- Eccellenti capacità organizzative, analitiche e interpersonali
- Conoscenza avanzata degli strumenti informatici per la gestione e il reporting pensionistico
- Competenze manageriali
- Lingue: Italiano, Inglese – Tedesco e Francese sono un vantaggio

## Relazioni Lavorative L'amministrazione della Fondazione è composta da un piccolo team, dove la collaborazione tra il Responsabile del Fondo Pensionistico e tutti gli altri ruoli del Team è essenziale. Il ruolo implica interazioni frequenti con i membri della Board, revisori esterni, attuari, ufficio risorse umane, riassicuratore, consulente di investimento, responsabile degli incarichi di investimento, manager di relazione della banca custode.

## Decisioni e Autonomia Gestione autonoma e strutturata di tutte le attività, con una visione globale di tutte le operazioni della Fondazione. Pianifica e organizza rapidamente le attività, riconoscendo le priorità, formulando soluzioni appropriate alle circostanze. Comunica tempestivamente le proprie opinioni ai colleghi, promuovendo trasparenza, circolazione delle informazioni all'interno del team e efficienza dei processi.

## Condizioni di Lavoro Lavoro in ufficio EFG a Lugano con frequenti viaggi verso gli uffici EFG o i fornitori di servizi (Attuario, Controllore degli Investimenti, istituti finanziari collaborativi, ...) a Ginevra o Zurigo.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Stellenüberblick Der Stiftungsleiter ist verantwortlich für die Verwaltung und Administration des Unternehmenspensionsfonds, wobei die Einhaltung der geltenden Vorschriften und der Schutz der Interessen der Mitarbeiter der verbundenen Unternehmen vor den wirtschaftlichen Folgen des hohen Alters, des Todes und der Behinderung gewährleistet werden. Er/sie koordiniert alle operativen, finanziellen und administrativen Aktivitäten des Pensionsfonds gemäß den Stiftungsregelungen, Politiken und gesetzlichen Bestimmungen.

## Aufgaben und Verantwortlichkeiten
- Gesamte Verantwortung für die administrative Verwaltung, technisch-kontabile und geschäftliche Aktivitäten der Stiftung
- Definition der finanziellen und versicherungsmathematischen Regelungen und Parameter, die den Plan unterliegen, um eine langfristige finanzielle Gleichgewicht zu erreichen
- Administrative und operative Verwaltung des Pensionsfonds, einschließlich der Registrierung der Mitglieder, der Verwaltung von Beiträgen und Leistungen
- Überwachung der Erstellung des Jahresberichts, der Buchhaltung und der versicherungsmathematischen Berichte an den Stiftungsrat und die Aufsichtsbehörden sowie der Berichte gemäß IAS 19 an EFG SA
- Koordination mit externen Stellen (versicherungsmathematische Berater, Prüfer, Aufsichtsbehörden) und Dienstleistern (Treuhänderbanken, Vermögensverwalter)
- Überwachung der Pensionsfonds-Investitionen gemäß den Investitionsregelungen und Risikokriterien
- Überwachung und Kontrolle der Jahresrechnungen, Finanzberichte und Dokumentationen, die von den Aufsichtsbehörden gefordert werden
- Unterstützung des Stiftungsrates bei der Definition der Strategie des Pensionsfonds, Sicherstellung der finanziellen Stabilität der Stiftung
- Verwaltung der Kommunikation mit den Mitgliedern, einschließlich Informationen zu Leistungen und regulatorischen Änderungen
- Überwachung der regulatorischen Entwicklungen im Bereich der Pensionsvorsorge und Aktualisierung der internen Verfahren
- Überwachung des internen Kontrollsystems
- Sicherstellung der konstanten Zusammenarbeit mit dem Personalabteilung von EFG SA, Vereinbarung von Verfahren, Identifizierung von Synergien und gemeinsame Analyse von gemeinsamen Themen
- Vorbereitung und Koordination der Sitzungen des Stiftungsrats und des Investmentkomitees, Erstellung der entsprechenden Protokolle
- Aktive Beratung in Sachen Pensionsvorsorge für alle Versicherten (aktive Mitarbeiter und Pensionäre)

## Anforderungen und Qualifikationen
- Abschluss in Wirtschaftswissenschaften, Finanzwissenschaften, Versicherungsmathematik oder verwandten Disziplinen
- Nachweisbare Erfahrung in der Verwaltung von Pensionsfonds, Vorsorgefonds oder ähnlichen Institutionen
- Solides Wissen über Pensionsgesetzgebung (z. B. LOB in der Schweiz oder vergleichbare lokale Gesetzgebung)
- Expertise in der Finanzverwaltung und Überwachung von Investitionen
- Ausgezeichnete organisatorische, analytische und zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten
- Fortgeschrittene Kenntnisse in IT-Tools für Pensionsverwaltung und Berichterstattung
- Führungskompetenzen
- Sprachen: Italienisch, Englisch – Deutsch und Französisch sind ein Vorteil

## Arbeitsbeziehungen Die Verwaltung der Stiftung besteht aus einem kleinen Team, in dem die Zusammenarbeit zwischen dem Stiftungsleiter und allen anderen Rollen des Teams entscheidend ist. Die Rolle beinhaltet häufige Interaktionen mit Mitgliedern des Vorstands, externen Prüfern, Versicherungsmathematikern, Personalabteilung, Rückversicherer, Investmentberater, Verantwortlichen für Investmentaufträge, Relationship Manager der Treuhänderbank.

## Entscheidungsfindung & Autonomie Autonomes und strukturiertes Management aller Aufgaben mit einem globalen Überblick über alle Operationen der Stiftung. Planung und Organisation der Aktivitäten rasch, Prioritäten erkennen, Lösungen entsprechend der Umstände formulieren. Ansichten gegenüber Kolleginnen und Kollegen rechtzeitig kommunizieren, um Transparenz, Informationsfluss innerhalb des Teams und Prozess-effizienz zu fördern.

## Arbeitsbedingungen Arbeiten im EFG-Büro in Lugano mit häufigen Reisen zu EFG-Büros oder Dienstleistern (Versicherungsmathematiker, Investmentcontroller, kooperierende Finanzinstitute, ...) in Genf oder Zürich.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Résumé du poste Le Gestionnaire du Fonds de Pension est chargé de la gestion et de l'administration du fonds de pension de l'entreprise, en veillant à respecter les réglementations en vigueur et à protéger les intérêts des employés des sociétés affiliées contre les conséquences économiques de la vieillesse, du décès et de l'incapacité. Il/elle coordonne toutes les activités opérationnelles, financières et administratives du fonds de pension, conformément aux règlements de la fondation, aux politiques et aux dispositions légales.

## Tâches et Responsabilités
- Responsabilité globale de la gestion administrative, technique-comptable et opérationnelle de la Fondation
- Définition des règlements et paramètres actuariels sous-jacents au plan afin d'atteindre un équilibre financier à long terme
- Gestion administrative et opérationnelle du fonds de pension, y compris l'inscription des membres, la gestion des cotisations et des prestations
- Supervision de l'établissement du Rapport Annuel, de la comptabilité et du reporting actuariel au conseil de la fondation et aux organismes de contrôle, ainsi que du reporting selon IAS 19 vers EFG SA
- Coordination avec les organismes externes (conseillers actuariels, auditeurs, autorités de contrôle) et les prestataires de services (banques dépositaires, gestionnaires d'actifs)
- Supervision des investissements du fonds de pension, conformément aux règlements d'investissement et critères de risque
- Supervision et contrôle des comptes annuels, états financiers et documents requis par les organismes de contrôle
- Soutien au Conseil de la Fondation dans la définition de la stratégie du fonds de pension, en garantissant la stabilité financière de la fondation
- Gestion des communications aux membres, y compris les informations sur les prestations et les changements réglementaires
- Suivi des développements réglementaires dans le domaine des retraites et mise à jour des procédures internes
- Supervision du système de contrôle interne
- Garantir une collaboration constante avec le service des ressources humaines d'EFG SA, en définissant des procédures, en identifiant des synergies et en analysant conjointement des sujets communs
- Préparation et coordination des réunions du conseil de la fondation et du comité d'investissement, en rédigeant les procès-verbaux correspondants
- Fournir activement des conseils en matière de retraite à tous les assurés (employés actifs et retraités)

## Exigences et Qualifications
- Diplôme en Économie, Finance, Science Actuarielle ou disciplines connexes
- Expérience prouvée dans la gestion de fonds de pension, de fonds de prévoyance ou d'institutions similaires
- Bonnes connaissances de la législation sur les retraites (ex. LOB en Suisse ou législation locale équivalente)
- Expertise en gestion financière et supervision des investissements
- Excellentes compétences organisationnelles, analytiques et interpersonnelles
- Connaissances avancées des outils informatiques pour la gestion et le reporting des retraites
- Compétences managériales
- Langues : Italien, Anglais – Allemand et Français sont un atout

## Relations de Travail L'administration de la Fondation est composée d'une petite équipe, où la collaboration entre le Gestionnaire du Fonds de Pension et tous les autres rôles de l'équipe est essentielle. Le poste implique des interactions fréquentes avec les membres du Conseil, auditeurs externes, actuaires, service des ressources humaines, réassureur, conseiller en investissement, responsable des mandats d'investissement, manager de relation de la banque dépositaire.

## Prise de Décision & Autonomie Gestion autonome et structurée de toutes les tâches, avec une vue d'ensemble globale de toutes les opérations de la Fondation. Planification et organisation rapides des activités, reconnaissance des priorités, formulation de solutions adaptées aux circonstances. Communication en temps voulu des points de vue aux collègues, en visant à promouvoir la transparence, le flux d'informations au sein de l'équipe et l'efficacité des processus.

## Conditions de Travail Travail au bureau EFG à Lugano avec des déplacements fréquents vers les bureaux EFG ou les prestataires de services (Actuaire, Contrôleur des Investissements, institutions financières collaboratives, ...) à Genève ou Zurich.

sections.heading: Job Summary
paragraphs: The Pension Fund Manager is in charge of managing and administering the company pension fund, ensuring compliance with current regulations and protection of the interests of the employees of affiliated companies against the economic consequences of old age, death, and disability. He/she coordinates all operational, financial, and administrative activities of the pension fund, in line with the foundation regulations, policies and legal provisions.

sections.heading: Working Relationships
paragraphs: The Administration of the Foundation is composed of a small team, where collaboration between the Pension Fund Manager and all other roles of the Team is essential.

The role implies frequent interactions with Board members, external auditors, actuaries, human resources office, reinsurer, investment advisory, responsible of investment mandates, relationship manager of the Custodian Bank.

sections.heading: Decision-Making & Autonomy
paragraphs: Autonomous and structured management of all tasks, with a global overview of the entire operations of the Foundation.

Plans and organizes activities quickly, recognizing priorities, formulating solutions appropriate to the circumstances. Communicates his views to colleagues in a timely manner, seeking to promote transparency, circulation of information within the team and process efficiency.

sections.heading: Working Conditions
paragraphs: Work in EFG Office Lugano with frequent travel to EFG offices or to service providers (Actuary, Investment Controller, cooperating financial institutions, …) in Geneva or Zurich.
